channel.title: 0xSec Blog
channel.description: A cybersecurity blog covering CTF challenges, reverse engineering, Kali Linux, web security, and penetration testing.

item.title: Building a Home Security Lab: Virtualization, Networking, and Target Machines
item.description: Learn how to build a complete cybersecurity lab environment at home using virtualization, Docker containers, and vulnerable machines for practice and research.

item.title: Web Security Fundamentals: OWASP Top 10 and Beyond
item.description: Master the fundamentals of web application security, from SQL injection and XSS to modern attack vectors. A practical guide based on the OWASP Top 10 and real-world examples.

item.title: Reverse Engineering Basics: From Assembly to Understanding
item.description: Dive into the fundamentals of reverse engineering, covering x86/x64 assembly, common tools like Ghidra and GDB, and practical techniques for analyzing binaries.

item.title: Kali Linux Essentials: Setting Up Your Penetration Testing Workstation
item.description: A comprehensive guide to setting up Kali Linux for penetration testing, including essential tools, configuration tips, and workflow optimization for security professionals.

item.title: Getting Started with CTF: A Beginner's Guide to Capture The Flag Competitions
item.description: Learn the fundamentals of Capture The Flag (CTF) competitions, the different categories, essential tools, and strategies to start your journey in competitive cybersecurity.
